summary: Completed testing of AI Executive Summary feature. Backend APIs (generate-summary and summary-status) fully functional with 8/8 tests passed. Frontend UI verified - AI Summary button visible, modal with Tone/Length selections working, AI generation returns quality results from GPT-4o at 95% confidence. Pricing page displays all AI feature cards correctly.

issues: Console warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby' for DialogContent - minor accessibility issue (pre-existing)

backend: GET /api/reports/summary-status - returns AI availability status (ai_available: true, provider: OpenAI GPT-4o)
POST /api/reports/generate-summary - professional tone with valid data returns AI-generated summary
POST /api/reports/generate-summary - executive tone returns valid response
POST /api/reports/generate-summary - casual tone returns valid response
POST /api/reports/generate-summary - long length returns substantial content
POST /api/reports/generate-summary - minimal data falls back gracefully
POST /api/reports/generate-summary - empty sections array handled gracefully
Integration test: status check then generate workflow works correctly
frontend: Report Builder page loads correctly (data-testid='report-builder-page')
AI Summary button visible with brain icon and gradient styling (data-testid='ai-summary-btn')
AI Summary modal opens when clicking button
Modal title shows 'AI Executive Summary' with 'PRO Feature' badge
Tone selection: Professional, Executive, Casual buttons all visible and clickable
Length selection: Short, Medium, Long buttons all visible and clickable
Report to Analyze section displays current report sections
AI-Powered Analysis info box displays correctly
Fallback Protection info box displays correctly
Generate Summary button visible and clickable (data-testid='generate-summary-btn')
AI generation works - returns 'Generated by AI (GPT-4o)' with 95% confidence
Generated summary includes Executive Summary text
Generated summary includes Key Insights (5 items)
Generated summary includes Recommendations (3 items)
Regenerate button available after generation
Add to Report button available after generation (data-testid='add-summary-to-report-btn')
Pricing page AI-Powered Features section visible
AI Executive Summary card visible on pricing page
AI Insights Assistant card visible on pricing page
Smart Fallback System card visible on pricing page
Future-Proof AI Infrastructure note displayed on pricing page

context_for_next_testing_agent: AI Executive Summary feature fully tested and working. Backend endpoints /api/reports/generate-summary (POST) and /api/reports/summary-status (GET) operational. AI uses GPT-4o via emergentintegrations library with template fallback. Frontend modal accessible via 'AI Summary' button in Report Builder header. Pricing page advertises AI features in dedicated section.
